response.justification: Bogdan has extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL-relevant tools, plus strong architecture and DevOps exposure, but his seniority level (Staff/Senior roles for over a decade) far exceeds the entry-level job scope, and his German language proficiency is only basic despite high on-site requirements in Berlin.
strengths: Deep TypeScript and React experience across multiple production systems
Proven full-stack ownership from API to UI with clean architecture focus
Strong DevOps and infrastructure skills (Docker, Kubernetes, AWS CDK)
concerns: Overqualified with 10+ years of senior experience, risking misalignment with junior role expectations
Limited evidence of PostgreSQL use — relies more on MongoDB and other DBs
Basic German proficiency conflicts with high on-site presence requirement in Berlin
